sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13524" key="a)popterugo/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπο-πτερῠγόομαι</orth>, <sense id="n13524.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lose the</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πτέρυγες,</foreign> of a rudder, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:287:36" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">287.36</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
